title: stenoloma retusum
intro: Stenoloma retusum, also known as the Toothed Stenoloma, is a species of fern native to Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stenoloma retusum are said to include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Stenoloma retusum is often prepared as a tea or infusion, or dried and used in herbal capsules or supplements.
